content.text: As of the latest data, Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC) is trading at $82,526.73, making it the highest-valued asset among the listed cryptocurrencies. Wrapped Ethereum (WETH) follows with a current price of $1,669.26. Solana (SOL) is priced at $119.05, while ai16z, a lower-cap digital asset, is trading at $0.1278. These prices reflect the current market standing of each token.
